signals.title: Grab raises $500M Series F extension for GrabFin expansion
Grab enters Vietnam digital banking market
New CTO appointed from Meta AI division
GrabMaps launched as standalone B2B API
Strategic partnership with Temasek for SEA infrastructure
MAS grants Grab digital banking license

summary: Grab is executing an aggressive fintech pivot across Southeast Asia with $500M fresh funding, a new CTO from Meta, and MAS digital banking license. Strong ICP fit (87/100) driven by expansion signals, tech hiring velocity, and GrabFin B2B product launch. Recommend immediate outreach to CTO and VP Engineering regarding AI infrastructure needs.
